name: SQL Injection
description: A vulnerability that allows attackers to interfere with database queries.

name: Cross-Site Scripting
description: A vulnerability that allows attackers to inject malicious JavaScript into web pages.

name: Server-Side Request Forgery
description: A vulnerability where the server makes unintended requests on behalf of the attacker.

name: Remote Code Execution
description: A vulnerability that allows attackers to execute arbitrary code on the server.

name: Broken Access Control
description: A vulnerability that allows unauthorized users to access restricted resources.
